html: Sorry, I also forgot to say, to the rest of your comment: Its actually 16gb M1. And yes the entire operation is, all running at the same time. Kali/UTM with an mcp server pointed at my LMstudio with gemma loaded as the local server. And maybe some spotify to lighten the mood while I work. But I learned not to have multiple things running, REAL QUICK. So ultimately I am running pretty healthy and no sort of crashes or choke points. I ran a 14b QWEN in LM Studio w/ no issue. Any higher and I think I would fall off a cliff somewhere.
